experiences.title: Dancing Syrtaki in a Village Square
experiences.description: Joined locals in a spontaneous Syrtaki dance under fairy lights during a summer evening in Naxos.

experiences.title: Olive Harvest in Crete
experiences.description: Spent a morning with a family in Crete handpicking olives and learning to press oil the traditional way.

experiences.title: Cooking with a Yiayia
experiences.description: Learned to make spanakopita and baklava in a family kitchen in Thessaloniki with a welcoming grandmother.

experiences.title: Full Moon Beach Concert in Mykonos
experiences.description: Watched local musicians perform traditional tunes by the sea, with dancing and bonfires lighting up the shore.
